Read a cached slot from disk

Source: R/cache.R
dot-tdr_cache_read.Rd

Accepts either a new-style attributed path string (schema v3+) or a legacy metadata list (schema v2) with a $path element.

Usage

.tdr_cache_read(meta_record)

Arguments

meta_record

An attributed path string (character scalar with attr(, "schema_v") and attr(, "bytes")), OR a legacy metadata list with $path and $schema_v.

Value

The deserialized R object.
